meta.description: Post-event follow-up where conversationNotes is present in lead_context. Three versions, all referencing the event and the conversation detail.

strategy.audience_context: Met at the Nexstar Network annual conference. Conversation about high interchange fees on large-ticket jobs collected in the field. Owner mentioned using Square for all field collections.
strategy.pain_point_hypothesis: High interchange on large-ticket field payments collected via Square; possible downgrade from card-not-present rates.
strategy.trust_angle: Reference the specific event conversation detail to show attentiveness.
strategy.cta: Happy to take a closer look at what those field transactions are costing you.
compliance_notes: Reference only what was discussed; do not invent conversation details
required_inclusions: Reference the conversation about field payments and Square
avoid: I hope this email finds you well
strategy.reasoning: Event follow-up with specific conversation notes. High personalization possible.

lead_context.conversationNotes: Met at Nexstar Network annual conference. Discussed high interchange fees on large HVAC jobs collected via Square in the field. Owner expressed interest in understanding whether a different setup would cost less.

selected_skill_definitions.instructions: Reference the event and the specific conversation. Show attentiveness to what was discussed.
Use the conversation detail to establish credibility and continuity.
Reference HVAC field payment context and Square usage as noted in the conversation.
Reference only what is in the conversation notes. Do not invent details. No savings guarantees.

expected.expected_subject_behavior: Subjects reference the event or the conversation; none are generic cold-outreach subjects
expected.expected_body_behavior: All 3 versions reference the Nexstar conference and the conversation about field payments and Square usage
expected.expected_cta_behavior: Each version proposes a low-friction next step based on the conversation
forbidden_phrases: I hope this email finds you well
forbidden_claims: invented conversation details not in conversationNotes
expected.pass_fail_notes: All versions must reference the Nexstar event and the Square conversation. Invented conversation details not in conversationNotes are a hard fail.
